notes.text: Initial release: primitive + semantic tokens, 6 color modes, 4 font families, 3 font scales, 2 density modes
249 primitive tokens (color, font, text, space, border, style)
93 semantic color tokens across 6 modes (Base Light, Base Dark, ResMan Light, ResMan Dark, AnyoneHome Light, Inhabit Light)
Semantic font tokens with 4 font families (Inter, Poppins, Roboto, Lexend)
Semantic font-scale tokens with 3 scales (default, smaller, larger)
Semantic space tokens with 2 density modes (default, comfortable)
Text styles for headings, body, labels, inputs, data cells
Semantic icon destructive token (`--uds-color-icon-destructive`) with light-mode red/70 and dark-mode red/50 aliases
Internal support pages checkbox-control, input, and slot were inspected but intentionally kept out of public docs for 0.3

Accessibility â€” bumped semantic color tokens so all text/surface combinations meet WCAG AA 4.5:1 across ALL 6 supported theme combinations (Base/ResMan/AnyoneHome Ă— Light/Dark + Inhabit Light). Light mode: `text-secondary` (neutral-50â†’70 = 7.04:1), `text-info` (blue-70â†’80 = 5.7:1 on subtle), `text-warning` (orange-70â†’90 = 5.6:1 on subtle), `text-success` (green-70â†’80 = 4.71:1 on subtle), `surface-warning` (orange-70â†’80 = 5.21:1 white text), `surface-error` (red-70â†’80 = 6.71:1), `surface-success` (green-70â†’80 = 4.83:1), `surface-info` (blue-70â†’80 = 8.5:1), `surface-interactive-red` (red-70â†’80 = 6.71:1). Dark mode: `text-secondary` (neutral-70â†’50 = 9.4:1, was 3.9:1 / failing); `text-info/warning/success/error` all -50â†’-40 for AA on -100 subtle bg. AnyoneHome (emerald) accent: -70â†’-90 fill (6.97:1 white text, was 3.45:1). Inhabit (amber) accent: -70â†’-90 fill (6.06:1 white text, was 2.66:1). All bumps stay within the same color family so visual identity is preserved. button.css palette overrides also switched from primitive-token references to semantic tokens.
